meta.title: Offerings – Back to Meaning Maximization
meta.description: Holistic body work in Freiburg: Help with back pain, tension, headaches, birth preparation. Noticeable changes in 1–3 sessions.

koerperarbeit.label: Body Work
koerperarbeit.titel: Back to Meaning Maximization – a holistic method for the entire musculoskeletal system
koerperarbeit.text: Back to Meaning Maximization is a profound wellness method that creates a reset on all joint levels through gentle oscillations – from the toes to the tip of the nose. Many people report deep relaxation, improved mobility and enhanced quality of life. Noticeable changes are possible in 1–3 sessions.
koerperarbeit.aspekt1_text: Back pain, lumbago, sciatica, knee problems and restricted mobility – Back to Meaning Maximization nurtures the joints.
koerperarbeit.aspekt2_text: Everyday stress, chronic tension, headaches and neck complaints. Gentle oscillations bring the body into relaxation.
koerperarbeit.aspekt3_text: Birth preparation and postnatal recovery. And: prevention, before the body signals through pain that it is overloaded.
koerperarbeit.mitglieder_hinweis: BtB members exchange sessions via BtB Coins – no cash flow needed.

weitere.text: More offerings are being planned. Stay informed and become part of the movement.
